commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_api.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_rate_limiting.py tests/test_prometheus.py -x -q

requirements_met.requirement: Burst requests from one IP to protected REST endpoints receive HTTP 429 with Retry-After before handler/store work.
requirements_met.evidence: tests/test_rate_limiting.py covers throttled 429 responses and verifies MagicMock store.load_all is not called after the client exceeds the limit.

requirements_met.requirement: Under-limit requests preserve existing response contracts.
requirements_met.evidence: tests/test_api.py and tests/test_rate_limiting.py passed; under-limit sessions/summary responses retain existing JSON shapes.

requirements_met.requirement: TPSConfig supports requests_per_minute and burst_size via defaults, TOML, env, and context with validation.
requirements_met.evidence: tests/test_config.py passed with added defaults, env, flat TOML, nested api.rate_limit TOML, context, and validation tests.

requirements_met.requirement: Prometheus exposes tps_api_rate_limited_total after throttled requests when available.
No external dependencies introduced and affected tests pass.
requirements_met.evidence: Implementation uses stdlib deque/time/threading plus existing FastAPI/Starlette; full affected test command passed 119 tests.
